title: Battle of Mogadishu
strengths: Compact source with the cleanest single statement on U.S. deaths, Somali mixed deaths, and rescue-column scale.
limitations: Not a primary after-action report and the Somali death figure is explicitly imprecise and status-mixed.
notes: Core source for the bounded battle window and mixed Somali fatality context.

title: Somalia intervention
strengths: Adds broader but still relevant context on the special operations task force size and on the scale of Somali armed response in the streets.
limitations: Task-force size is not the same as the simultaneously engaged battle force; Somali dead are still not separated into fighters and civilians.
notes: Used only for context on why a publishable denominator is missing.

title: Urban Warfare Project Case Study #9: The Battle of Mogadishu
strengths: Useful for rejecting whole-city civilian denominators and for describing the size of the relief column.
limitations: Not a casualty dataset and the whole-city population is explicitly unsuitable for this project’s episode-level denominator logic.
notes: Used to document why broader city population figures are excluded.
